AICARDMOD-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
AICARDMOD-FAITH_POWER.description: A resource that does not disappear at the end of the turn.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.title: Revelation
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.description: At the end of each turn, every 3 Revelation triggers 1 holy arrow.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.smartDescript: Current Revelation: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. One holy arrow triggers at the end of each turn for every 3 stacks.
AICARDMOD-INFINITE_GLORY_POWER.title: Infinite Glory
AICARDMOD-INFINITE_GLORY_POWER.descripti: Whenever Revelation triggers, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
AICARDMOD-INFINITE_GLORY_POWER.smartDesc: Triggered [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s). Each Revelation: +1 Strength, +1 Dexterity.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.title: Next-turn Draw
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.descripti: Adjust draw at the start of your next turn, then remove this effect. Positive values draw more cards; negative values are currently a no-op.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.smartDesc: Next turn start draw changes by [blue]{Amount}[/blue], then this effect expires.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.title: Stored Energy
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, gain this much Energy.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.smartDe: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Energy next turn start, then this effect expires.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_REVELATION_POWER.des: Gain this much Revelation at the start of your next turn, then remove this effect.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_REVELATION_POWER.sma: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Revelation next turn start, then this effect expires.
AICARDMOD-PIETY_END_TURN_POWER.title: Relic Box
AICARDMOD-PIETY_END_TURN_POWER.descripti: At the end of the turn, gain the same amount of Faith.
AICARDMOD-PIETY_END_TURN_POWER.smartDesc: At end of turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Faith.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_START_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of the turn, gain the same amount of Revelation.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_START_TURN_POWER.sm: At the start of turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Revelation.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_PER_CARD_THIS_TURN_: Each card you play this turn grants 1 Revelation.
Each card you play this turn grants [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Revelation.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_ECHO_POWER.title: Revelation Echo
AICARDMOD-HOLY_MIGHT_POWER.title: Holy Might
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.title: Doomsday Judgment
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.descri: After each Revelation trigger, subsequent Revelation damage this turn increases.
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.smartD: After each Revelation trigger, subsequent Revelation damage +[blue]{Amount}[/blue] this turn.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.title: Causality
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.description: For the rest of this turn, that enemy takes additional damage whenever it takes damage.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.smartDescripti: For the rest of this turn, that enemy takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage whenever it is damaged.
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.title: Misstep
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.description: Each attack deals 25% less damage, then remove 1 stack.
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.smartDescription: Each attack deals 25% less damage, then remove 1 stack. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] stack(s) remaining.
Each time Revelation triggers, draw 1 card.
Revelation bonus active: draw 1 card per trigger.
